data.title: The number of Americans filing for initial jobless claims for the week ending March 28 was 202,000, compared to an expected 212,000.
data.description: U.S. initial jobless claims for the week ending March 28 were 202,000, below the expected 212,000 and the previous week's figure revised from 210,000 to 211,000. The four-week moving average of initial jobless claims for the week ending March 28 was 207,750, with the previous week's figure revised from 210,500 to 210,750. Continuing jobless claims for the week ending March 21 were 1,841,000, below the expected 1,839,000 and the previous week's figure revised from 1,819,000 to 1,816,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: ZeroStack secures $107 million in 0G token funding, locking up nearly 21% of the 0G supply.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed ZeroStack Corp. announced a definitive agreement for a $107 million funding round pegged to its 0G token. Upon completion of the deal, ZeroStack will hold approximately 21% of the total 0G token supply. Under the terms of the funding round, ZeroStack will establish a Texas-based company, Texas Blocker, to facilitate the transaction. Investors will contribute 142,232,948 native 0G tokens (worth approximately $107 million). Texas Blocker will become a wholly owned subsidiary of ZeroStack after the share exchange is completed. The share exchange is expected to close around July 5, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions and shareholder approval. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Telegram Crypto Wallet Launches Perpetual Contract Trading
data.description: Telegram's in-telegram crypto wallet, "Wallet in Telegram," has announced the launch of perpetual contract trading, powered by Lighter. It supports over 50 markets, including metals, stocks, oil, and cryptocurrencies, with leverage up to 50x.

data.title: Iranian Commander Killed in Attack Amid Rising Tensions
data.description:
An Iranian media report has confirmed the death of a senior commander from the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' special forces in an attack. According to RTHK, the Iranian Islamic Republic of Broadcasting stated that the Joint Operations Command of the armed forces claimed that the United States and Israel have only limited intelligence and are unaware of Iran's extensive strategic capabilities. The targets they believe they have hit are deemed insignificant.

Iran's Army Chief Commander, Hatami, has instructed the operations command to maintain high vigilance, closely monitor the movements of the U.S. and Israel, and respond appropriately. He emphasized that if a ground war is initiated by the enemy, no enemy personnel should be allowed to survive.

The Tasnim News Agency quoted an Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson, who stated that Iran will take necessary actions to prevent the Strait of Hormuz from being used for military aggression against Iran, stressing that these measures are fully in line with international law.

data.title: Telegram's Crypto Wallet Introduces Perpetual Contract Trading
data.description: On April 2, Telegram's integrated crypto wallet, Wallet in Telegram, announced the launch of perpetual contract trading. According to BlockBeats, the new feature is supported by Lighter and offers trading across more than 50 markets. These markets include metals, stocks, oil, and cryptocurrencies, with leverage options reaching up to 50 times.

data.title: UBS: Gold still has a chance to reach new highs this year, with an average price of $5,000 for the year.
data.description: UBS strategist Jonny Tevez predicts that gold prices will reach new highs this year despite recent volatility, viewing recent pullbacks as buying opportunities. UBS forecasts an average gold price of $5,000 per ounce in 2026, $4,800 in 2027, and $4,250 in 2028. (Golden10)

data.title: CME Group Reports Surge in Cryptocurrency Contract Trading Volume in March
data.description:
CME Group has announced a significant increase in the average daily trading volume of cryptocurrency contracts for March, reaching 210,000 contracts with a nominal value of $7.98 billion. According to ChainCatcher, this marks a 19% growth. The micro Bitcoin futures saw a 6% rise in average daily contract trading volume, reaching 77,000 contracts, while Ethereum futures experienced a 53% increase, with 19,000 contracts traded daily.

Additionally, the overall average daily trading volume on the CME platform reached 41.1 million contracts in March, setting a new monthly record with a 33% year-over-year increase. The first quarter also saw a record high, with an average daily trading volume of 36.2 million contracts, reflecting a 22% year-over-year growth.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Turkey's Central Bank Sells 26 Tons of Gold
data.description: Turkey's central bank reportedly sold approximately 26 tons of gold last week, according to Odaily. This move comes amid ongoing economic adjustments and strategic financial decisions by the bank. The sale is part of broader efforts to manage the country's monetary resources effectively.

data.title: U.S. Crude Oil Futures Surge Past $110 Per Barrel
data.description: U.S. crude oil futures have continued their upward trend, surpassing $110 per barrel. According to Odaily, the price increased by 10% within the day, reflecting ongoing market dynamics.

data.title: France's Lise Exchange to Host Europe's First On-Chain IPO for Aerospace Firm
data.description: France's Lise Exchange has announced plans to conduct Europe's first fully on-chain IPO for aerospace company ST Group on April 9. According to Odaily, as one of the EU's initial DLT pilot exchanges, Lise has garnered support from institutions like BNP Paribas. The exchange's on-chain listing model aims to achieve rapid settlement and transparent equity tracking, directly competing with the tokenized securities strategies of Nasdaq and the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: French stock exchange Lise plans to launch a fully on-chain IPO on April 9, with ST Group listing on the on-chain exchange.
data.description: French stock exchange Lise announced that it will host Europe's first fully on-chain IPO for aerospace company ST Group on April 9. As one of the EU's first DLT pilot exchanges, Lise has received support from institutions such as BNP Paribas. Its on-chain listing model will achieve second-level settlement and transparent equity tracking, directly competing with the tokenized securities strategies of Nasdaq and the NYSE. (Coindesk)

data.title: U.S. crude oil futures extended their gains, rising above $110 a barrel.
data.description: According to Gate data, U.S. crude oil futures continued their upward trend, rising above $110 per barrel, up 10% on the day.

data.title: The Central Bank of Türkiye sold approximately 26 tons of gold last week.
data.description: Banking sources say that data from the Turkish central bank shows the bank sold approximately 26 tons of gold last week. (Jinshi)

data.title: Solana Foundation Chair Addresses Impact of Drift Incident
data.description:
On April 2, Solana Foundation Chair Lily Liu commented on the significant impact of the Drift incident on the ecosystem. According to BlockBeats, Liu stated that the Drift team is working tirelessly to investigate and manage the situation, with the foundation providing support. She emphasized that the smart contract itself has proven resilient, noting that the real target of the attack was individuals, focusing on social engineering and operational security vulnerabilities rather than exploiting code.

Liu highlighted Solana's history of overcoming challenges through rapid iteration, improved development, mutual support, and enhanced security measures. She urged vigilance, advising users to review their security settings and continue building. Updates will be provided as new developments occur.

data.title: Iranian Naval Command to Expand Targets Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: On April 2, the Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy announced plans to broaden its target range as conflicts intensify. According to BlockBeats, the naval command aims to expedite the removal of U.S. presence in the region. In a series of retaliatory actions against attacks on national infrastructure by U.S. and Israeli adversaries, specific targets have been identified, including the American steel industry in Abu Dhabi, Bahrain's Al-Hidd Industrial City, and remaining aluminum infrastructure in Bahrain.

data.title: Soluna Holdings Acquires Wind Farm to Develop AI Data Center
data.description: Soluna Holdings, a Nasdaq-listed company focused on developing green data centers for Bitcoin mining and AI applications, has announced the acquisition of a wind farm in West Texas for $53 million. According to Odaily, this acquisition will facilitate the launch of the Dorothy 3 project, aimed at establishing a renewable energy-powered AI data center.

data.title: CME Group's March cryptocurrency contract trading volume increased by 19% daily, reaching a notional value of $7.98 billion.
data.description: The Chicago Mercantile Exchange Group (CME Group) reported that cryptocurrency futures averaged 210,000 contracts per day in March, with a notional value of $7.98 billion, a 19% increase. Specifically, micro Bitcoin futures saw a 6% increase in daily contract volume, reaching 770 million contracts, while Ethereum futures saw a 53% increase, reaching 190 million contracts per day. Furthermore, the CME Group's overall contract volume averaged 41.1 million contracts per day in March, a new monthly high and a 33% year-over-year increase; the first quarter averaged 36.2 million contracts per day, a new quarterly high and a 22% year-over-year increase. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Eightco Holdings Reveals Significant Worldcoin Holdings
data.description: Eightco Holdings, a company listed on the Nasdaq, has disclosed its asset holdings as of March 30, 2026. According to Odaily, the company holds 277,222,975 Worldcoin (WLD) and 11,068 ETH. Additionally, Eightco has made an indirect investment of $90 million in OpenAI and a $25 million investment in Beast Industries. The company also possesses cash and stablecoins totaling $109 million, bringing its total holdings to approximately $326 million. Eightco claims to be the largest publicly traded company in the Worldcoin ecosystem.

data.title: NVIDIA's 8% Rise Amid $2 Billion Investment in Marvell Technology
data.description: NVIDIA experienced an approximate 8% increase in its stock price between March 30 and April 1, reaching $175.75 following the announcement of a $2 billion strategic investment in Marvell Technology. According to NS3.AI, despite this rebound, there are signs of weaker institutional flow and more bearish options positioning. Additionally, resistance is observed near key moving averages, which may impact future price movements.

data.title: Zhifei Biological and Merck Sign Revised Agreement to Enhance Strategic Cooperation
data.description: Zhifei Biological announced on April 2 that it has signed a revised and restated supply, distribution, and co-promotion agreement with Merck, effective April 2, 2026. According to Jin10, the original agreement will terminate upon the new agreement's activation. The revised agreement aims to deepen strategic cooperation between the two companies, enhance market coordination capabilities, and alleviate operational pressures. The agreement covers products including the nine-valent HPV vaccine, with the collaboration set to continue until the end of 2028, with an option to extend for two additional years. Zhifei Biological will dynamically adjust procurement and supply volumes based on market demand, with regular disclosures on the agreement's execution. The new agreement does not stipulate a base procurement amount for the products. Instead, Zhifei Biological and Merck will negotiate expected procurement and supply plans based on market demand forecasts and actual vaccination rates, with specific procurement details confirmed through written orders from both parties.
